analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with animated slides and interactive elements. The current theme is cosmic/dark with black hole visuals, but needs enhancement to fully realize the animated objects, slides, and page animations as specified in the event. The CSS has incomplete animations and patterns, and the JavaScript needs completion for slide transitions and interactive features.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS with full dark cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add CSS variables for cosmic colors and ensure all animations are properly defined.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including showSlide, event listeners, and functionality for the new buttons added in index.html. Fix syntax errors and ensure smooth animations and interactions.
